compiled_state.title: RED: Tests for ARCHIVED event handling in reducer
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Create or modify tests to verify ARCHIVED event handling in the reducer.

## File Impact
- Create: `tests/scripts/test-ticket-archived.sh` (new test file for ARCHIVED behavior)
- Modify: `.test-index` (add mapping with RED marker)

## TDD Requirement (RED)
- `test_archived_ticket_excluded_from_batch_list`: Create a ticket, add an ARCHIVED event, run `python3 ticket-reducer.py --batch --exclude-archived <tracker>`, verify the archived ticket is NOT in the output. RED because --exclude-archived flag doesn't exist yet.
- `test_archived_ticket_included_in_show`: Create a ticket with ARCHIVED event, run `python3 ticket-reducer.py <ticket_dir>` (single-ticket mode), verify it IS returned with archived flag. RED because ARCHIVED handling doesn't exist yet.
- `test_archived_event_accepted_by_lib`: Write an ARCHIVED event via write_commit_event, verify it succeeds. RED because ARCHIVED is not in the lib enum yet.

Test approach: Each test creates a temp git repo with ticket fixtures, writes ARCHIVED event JSON files directly, and verifies reducer behavior.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/scripts/test-ticket-archived.sh
- [ ] At least 3 test functions
  Verify: grep -c '^test_' tests/scripts/test-ticket-archived.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
- [ ] Tests fail RED
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-archived.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAIL'
- [ ] .test-index entries with RED markers for ticket-reducer.py and ticket-lib.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'test-ticket-archived' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: 3 RED tests for ARCHIVED event handling.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
